config_contents:
diagnostics:
  field_dump_interval: 500
  mode: analysis
  particle_dump_interval: 5000
dt_multiplier: 0.95
keep_checkpoints: false
nozzle:
  coils:
  - I: 6366.197723675814
    r: 0.08
    z: 0.0
  domain:
    r_max: 0.5
    z_max: 2.0
    z_min: -0.5
  resolution:
    nr: 128
    nz: 256
  type: solenoid
output_dir: results/validation/resistive_dimov
plasma:
  T_e_eV: 10.0
  T_i_eV: 5.0
  electron_model: kinetic
  mass_ratio: null
  n0: 1.0e+21
  neutrals: null
  species:
  - D+
  - e-
  v_injection_ms: 50000.0
random_seed: null
timesteps: 50000
hardware:
Platform: darwin (arm64)
CPU cores: 12
Apple Silicon: Apple M4 Pro
Recommended backend: omp
OMP threads: 12
